<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"System health"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/management/health"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get details about system health

If you need to monitor the responsiveness of the Skribble API, you may want to
have a look at the health resource. It will give you a short update about the 
current status of the system.

`status:UP` tells you that the system is up and running.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
